description: Intent-only request: ask a clarifying question for underspecified inbox handling instead of guessing workflow or agent.

text: This is not a request to build or execute anything. Do not create workflows, do not create agents, and do not run anything.
I only want you to classify the intent of this hypothetical request:

Say whether this should be handled as a deterministic workflow, a hybrid workflow with a bounded AI judgment step, a full agent, or a single AI task. Briefly explain why in terms of control flow, runtime decision-making, tool-use loops, unstructured data, and whether the next action depends on prior results.

processExpectations: The agent treats the inbox handling request as underspecified.
The agent asks a clarifying question instead of forcing a workflow, hybrid, or agent classification.
The agent explains that rule-based filing could be a workflow while autonomous triage could be an agent.
